skills.name: PR Summary
skills.description: Generates a concise, reviewer-friendly summary of a pull request from its diff, including risk callouts and a suggested test plan.

skills.name: Incident Runbook
skills.description: Walks an on-call engineer through the standard incident response: declare severity, open a channel, page the right team, and draft the status update.

skills.name: Design Review
skills.description: Reviews a frontend component or page against the internal design system and accessibility checklist, then proposes concrete fixes.

skills.name: SQL Explain
skills.description: Explains a slow query plan in plain language and suggests indexes or rewrites, tuned for the team's Postgres conventions.
